title: Emotional intelligence/emotional quotient (EQ)
summary: 9609 A Level — self-awareness, empathy, and EQ in leadership.
learningObjectives: Evaluate development of EQ in managers.

simpleExplanation.title: Leading with empathy
simpleExplanation.summary: EQ is the ability to recognise and manage emotions in oneself and others, improving communication and decision-making.

sections.content: **EQ** (7.3.3) supports **7.2 communication** and **2.2 motivation**. Give **behavioural evidence** from cases.
